hero.title: We give shape
hero.description: A Mexican-American game studio crafting original worlds, unforgettable creatures, and games that teach — built by five Yucatecans who have been at this for two decades.

manifesto.body: For two decades we drew monsters, wrote impossible worlds, and shipped them under other names. Unknown Creature is the banner we finally raise as our own — a studio for original games, characters, and stories that honor where we come from.

originalGames.title: Original games
originalGames.text: Worlds, creatures, and stories born entirely in-house — our first original title is in production now.

educationalGames.title: Educational games
educationalGames.text: We turn complex knowledge into experiences students actually want to play — currently building edugames for universities across Bolivia and Belgium.

smallCards.title: Characters & story
smallCards.text: Two decades of comics, character design, and narrative across Mexico, the US, and Europe.

smallCards.title: Animation & art
smallCards.text: Hand-crafted motion and illustration that finally gives the unknown a face.

smallCards.title: Engineering
smallCards.text: Full-stack systems, AI, and the production tech that keeps the studio shipping.

studio.description: Five Yucatecans, one studio, two countries. We honor our roots while building for a global audience.

timeline.bodyPost: , one of the earliest graphic design and illustration studios in Mérida — where most of us first met and learned the craft.
— a concept and a creature that would eventually pull the whole team under one banner.

timeline.bodyPre: Unknown Creature Games is formally founded in Mérida, Yucatán, with a business center in

timeline.bodyPost: — the first time we share all of our creative talent with the world under our own name.

team.description: Designers, illustrators, animators, and an engineer — together for over two decades.

members.name: Benjamín Carbonero
members.title: Creative Director · Writer
members.bioPre: 26 years across comics, games, and film — including work with Kevin Grevioux, creator of

members.name: Alonso Pérez Cervera
members.title: Art Director · Graphic Designer
members.bio: Mexican illustrator and designer known as Jaxinto — 20+ years across illustration, branding, comics, and character design, from Mérida.

members.name: José Cobá Herrera
members.title: Character & Visual Development
members.bio: 15+ years designing characters and interfaces for educational and entertainment games.

members.name: Juan Fleites
members.title: Illustrator & Animator
members.bio: Horror, sci-fi, and humor across indie comics in Mexico, the US, and Europe.

members.name: Diego Salazar
members.title: Technical Director
members.bio: Full-stack architect with 10+ years building scalable systems, AI, and the tech behind the studio.

careers.title: Want to build the unknown with us?

game.description: Our first original game is in the works. An original story, an original world, and a creature all our own.

notify.description: Drop your email and we will tell you the moment our first game — and everything around it — goes live.
notify.successPre: Thanks — you're on the list. We'll reach out from
notify.error: Something went wrong — please try again.

footer.tagline: A Mexican-American game studio. We are all Yucatecans, honoring our roots while leaving a mark on the entertainment industry.
footer.copyright: © 2026 Unknown Creature Games. All rights reserved.
footer.signature: We give shape to the unknown

metadata.title: Unknown Creature Games — A Mexican-American Game Studio
metadata.description: Unknown Creature Games is a Mexican-American studio crafting original worlds, unforgettable creatures, and educational games. Built by five Yucatecans, from Mérida to Houston.
